title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Vishal Mega Mart

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Vishal Mega Mart
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vishal Mega Mart! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vishal Mega Mart:
Vishal Mega Mart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
